libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/native-image runs on JDK 25, set runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for version 5.0.1 as well as 5.0.0. Meaningful tests can use `Vertx.vertx()`, a local `HttpServer` bound to `127.0.0.1`, and `WebClient`/`WebClientSession`/`CachingWebClient`; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact has optional/test-only integrations such as `vertx-auth-oauth2` and `jackson-databind`; generated tests should avoid OAuth2WebClient or POJO databind coverage unless those dependencies are intentionally added.
Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative for whether the Netty system properties are still sufficient on the target JDK/native-image mode.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is usable with local Vert.x HTTP servers and its normal transitive dependencies, but its Netty 4.2.x runtime still needs Java 25 native-image unsafe-access system properties.
